title: Universal Studios Japan Eva 20 Attraction in 2016
display_title: Universal Studios Japan Eva 20 Attraction in 2016
wikitext:
[]: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Nov 30, 2015 3:12 pm http://www.usj.co.jp/universal-cool-japan2016/evangelion/ http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-4217.html This looks pretty cool! An Eva 2.0-themed attraction is coming to USJ some time next year. There's a very short teaser trailer up on youtube showing off some lovely CGI clips for Eva 01, 00, Zeruel, and Unit 04 of all things! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vaqQh8CiqRc It looks like Unit 04 might be the audience's PoV character for this. I'm not sure what to think of those pterodactyl wings, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Mon Nov 30, 2015 10:05 pm ^That's really cool. (Also I wounder what the name of the VA was for the announcer). BTW I think the wings might actually be Mark 06, just looked darker than Unit-04. Extremely cool that the 4D ride gets a sequel, must have done extremely well.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Nov 30, 2015 11:09 pm The announcer sounded kinda like Gendo or Keel to me. Grabbed some screenshots from the HD trailer. There's a lot of motion blur in it, but I got a few nice ones: Zeruel Attacks the Audience  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 01, 2015 3:02 am What is this I don't even BlueBasilisk wrote: The announcer sounded kinda like Gendo or Keel to me.

[]: Re: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Dec 04, 2015 2:42 pm It's just their updated Eva THE REAL 4.D ride that they've had (Similar to the RE and other franchise-based rides). I forget what the original ride 4D Universal Studio Japan ride featured, other than apparently an original story, but this looks interesting too!

[]: Re:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Fri Dec 04, 2015 7:52 pm Reichu wrote: I'll second Mugihito (i.e., Keel).

[]: Re: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by FullMetalBiscuit » Sat Dec 05, 2015 1:01 pm Is this only on in 2016? I should be going to Japan in 2017...

[]: Re: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Dec 09, 2015 3:16 pm You can get a pretty spiffy Unit 04 figure sporting the new paint scheme and weapons and a Nerv ID card! SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Re:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 09, 2015 5:53 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: You can get a pretty spiffy Unit 04 figure sporting the new paint scheme and weapons and a Nerv ID card! SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Jan 05, 2016 2:53 pm There's a new video out showing off Unit 04's new deco and the triple drill gloves: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DkVUseQeR5M That weapon has Yamashita written all over it, doesn't it? I do like the new tron lines and detailing on the Eva itself. They help it feel more like a unique Eva and less like Eva 03 with a chrome addiction. Edit: Some pictures! SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by FullMetalBiscuit » Tue Jan 05, 2016 4:13 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: I see Mari's name mentioned in the video description, so I guess she's the pilot? She'll overtake Kaworu's record of "most Evas piloted" at this rate!

[]: Re: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Jan 05, 2016 4:30 pm Depends on how far you go into the spin-off material. Just the movies, it's 3-2 in Mari's favor. With NGE, they're tied at three each. If you factor in games, she has four (02, 05, 08 and 04 if she's really in this) and he has six (02, 04, 06, 13, a Mass Production Eva in GFoS2 and Beta).

[]: Re: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by FullMetalBiscuit » Tue Jan 05, 2016 4:37 pm Ah, I see. I don't know anything about the games, was just counting from Rebuild and NGE.

[]: Re: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu Jan 14, 2016 2:56 pm Eva fan has a new post detailing some of the sweet new merch available at the attraction via a collection of tweets: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-4310.html I really want one of these Unit 01 popcorn buckets! SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by Rei IV » Fri Jan 15, 2016 8:17 pm That's so fucking cool!

[]: Popcorn and Mystery, or "what exactly is this?"             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Mon Jan 18, 2016 11:05 am This is an image from the Evangelion popcorn stand that recently circulated teh interwebs - to the right of Yui's popcorn-filled cranium is a white and red Evangelion I've never seen before (another image promotes Evangelion 2.0 in "Real 4D", though the unknown Eva seems to be unrelated to 2.0): SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Popcorn and Mystery, or "what exactly is this?"             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Mon Jan 18, 2016 11:07 am Unit-04, which i believe made an appearance in the Evangelion Pachinko games

[]: Re: Popcorn and Mystery, or "what exactly is this?"             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Jan 18, 2016 11:21 am thread/17957/Universal-Studios-Japan-Eva-20-Attraction-in-2016/

[]: Re: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by kuro hazama » Tue Jan 19, 2016 6:09 am Theres a video on youtube with the sound of the attraction, There is a lot of action going on, but it doesnt sound like Unit 04 does much at all, since all evas have their poke at Zeruel and then Unit 04(piloted by Mari and you coming along in the ride as a guest around the geofront) tries and jobs, but then Unit one does the DMS stages stuff and all happens the same as in 2.0 with kaworu stopping third Impact. The same as the first attraction, theres a lot of foreshadowing and hinting at the story planned for the final film, and all but confirms some theories: In the first attraction Kaworu tells Shinji he is meant to guide the Lilin, but not yet. There was some revealing stuff among Gendou and SEELE abou the pilots and some kind of SHIN(?) This time Kaji tells Mari when 01 reachs DMS stage 2 that Shinji and Rei are indeed "compatible types" an this has made unit 01 a trigger and Mari says "So this is what Gendou´s trying, repeat the same that happened 15 years ago" and Kaji says "exactly, to explode?(I dindt get this word right as the audio is pretty bad) this world, the Third Impact has begun, and the world is going to end". At this point Mari sadly cant do anything to save you since Unit 04s out of juice but Kaworu comes in and puts Shinji to sleep for 14 years while "Tsubasa Wo Kudasai" starts playing as Kaworu descends. All in all pretty awesome stuff, right?

[]: Re: Universal Studios Japan Eva 2.0 Attraction in 2016             Quote Post by KRandMJ » Thu Mar 03, 2016 6:41 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: I really want one of these Unit 01 popcorn buckets! SPOILER: Show

An Eva 2.0-themed attraction is coming to USJ some time next year. There's a very short teaser trailer up on youtube showing off some lovely CGI clips for Eva 01, 00, Zeruel, and Unit 04
